evidence.observed: p95 latency exceeded 13000ms with max latency reaching 23980ms

findings.root_cause: model_price_tier is set to premium and context_size is set to 8, leading to heavy inference latency.
findings.suggested_fix: Change model_price_tier to standard and reduce context_size to 2.

evidence.observed: Average cost per call is around $0.002 due to ~19,500 prompt tokens per single-turn request.

findings.root_cause: context_size is set to 8 and model_price_tier is set to premium, causing large prompt injection of context/history.
findings.suggested_fix: Change model_price_tier to standard and reduce context_size to 2.

evidence.observed: Tool calls fail intermittently with error rate of 18%.

findings.root_cause: tool_error_rate is set to 0.18 in config.json.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate to 0.0 in config.json and keep retry enabled.

evidence.observed: session_drift_rate of 0.06 is configured, leading to degraded answer quality and private coupon corruption over turns. Private outputs showed SALE15 as 30%, VIP20 as 40%, and WINNER as 20% or 0%.

findings.suggested_fix: Set session_drift_rate to 0.0 in config.json and validate coupon percentages against fixed invariants.

evidence.observed: The agent calls get_discount and calc_shipping even when not required, and tool_budget is set to 5.

findings.root_cause: tool_budget is set to 5 and prompt lacks tight instructions to economize tool usage.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget to 3 and instruct the prompt to only call necessary tools once.

evidence.observed: Raw customer phone numbers/emails are echoed back in the answers, requiring regex redaction.

findings.root_cause: The prompt lacks clear instructions to not repeat customer phone/email details, and redact_pii is not fully compliant.
findings.suggested_fix: Instruct the system prompt to never repeat phone/email, and verify redact_pii is true.

evidence.observed: Agent gets stuck in loops and reaches max_steps without returning a result.

findings.root_cause: loop_guard is set to false in config.json.
findings.suggested_fix: Set loop_guard to true in config.json.

evidence.observed: MacBook is incorrectly reported as out of stock due to catalog_override, and unicode cities fail delivery checks.

findings.root_cause: catalog_override has fake out-of-stock data and normalize_unicode is false.
findings.suggested_fix: Clear catalog_override to {} and set normalize_unicode to true.

evidence.observed: Calculated totals are inconsistent and mathematically incorrect across multiple requests.

findings.root_cause: temperature is set to 1.6 in config.json.
findings.suggested_fix: Set temperature to 0.2 and add strict verification formula in system prompt.

evidence.observed: Private questions include GHI CHU KHACH notes that try to force fake unit prices and bypass system/tool prices. In the same private run, several valid coupons drifted to wrong percentages: SALE15=30%, VIP20=40%, WINNER=20% or 0%.

findings.root_cause: The prompt and wrapper did not fully strip ASCII note markers such as GHI CHU KHACH and did not enforce immutable coupon percentage invariants after model generation.
findings.suggested_fix: Treat note sections as data only, strip note sections in the wrapper, pin coupon invariants in the prompt, and post-validate successful totals against SALE15=15, VIP20=20, WINNER=10, EXPIRED=0.
